headline: Trump 🍊👑 Hears Iran KILLINGS STOPPED 😵❌ – Mullahs SHAKING 🫨💦!
text:
DONALD J. TRUMP 🍊🦅 dropping BOMBS 💣📢 from White House 🏛️: 'Killing in Iran 😵🔪 has STOPPED 🛑, no more EXECUTIONS 🚫💀 – good authority sources spilling TEA ☕ on the OTHER SIDE 👀!' But ORANGE MAN BAD? Nah, not RULING OUT military SLAPDOWN 👋💥 on Tehran mullah SIMPS 🤡👳‍♂️ after BLOODY crackdown 🩸🔥 on protesters – HRANA counting 2,400+ DEAD 😱⚰️ including 13 KIDS 👶💔, protests POPPIN' off from currency MELTDOWN 💸📉 to Khamenei CLOWN SHOW 🤡👑 legitimacy CRISIS! Trump earlier FLEXED 'VERY STRONG ACTION' 😤👊 if they hang peeps, like poor Erfan Soltani 👦🛒 – 26yo clothes shop OWNIE 🍆👕 from Fardis nabbed mid-RIOT 🔥, family crying EXECUTION DATE 📅💀 but Iran state media DENYIN' 😏🚫, FM Abbas Araghchi sippin' haterade 🧂: 'NO HANGING today/tomorrow ⏰❌ – don't REPEAT June 2025 NUKE BOMB FLOP 💣☢️ like a BAD EX!' (Reminder: US yeeted THREE Iranian nuke sites 🏭☢️ cuz Tehran glow-up to BOMBS 😈)

Iran AIRSPACE SHUT 🔒✈️ for 5 HOURS 🌙🛑 – airlines REROUTIN' like scared pigeons 🐦💨 around Mullah-land! UK embassy in Tehran GONE FISHIN' 🏖️📵 remote mode, US pullin' peeps from Al-Udeid Qatar base 🛫🏜️ (BIGGEST ME hub with 10K Yanks + 100 Brits 👨‍✈️🇺🇸🇬🇧) as 'PRECAUTIONARY VIBE CHECK' 😎🛡️. Lufthansa, Germany, Italy, Poland ALL yellin' 'GTFO Iran 🚫🇮🇷' to citizens ✈️🏃‍♂️, Saudi US mission: 'CAUTION MODE ON 🔴 at military spots!' Qatar chillin' 'WE GOT SECURITY ON LOCK 🔒🛡️'. Trump TWEETIN' on Truth Social 📱💬: 'IRANIANS KEEP PROTESTING 🗣️🔥 – HELP IS ON THE WAY 🚀🦅!' But playin' coy on backin' Reza Pahlavi 👑✈️ (exiled Shah's SON, protesters CHANTIN' his name 📣🍑) – 'Nice dude 🤷‍♂️, but IDK if Iran SIMPS for him yet 🇮🇷❓ – any regime CAN CRUMBLE 💥🏰!'

Tehran NET BLACKOUT 🌐🚫 since last Thursday 📵😤 to HIDE the BODIES 💀🔒, BBC + intl media BLINDED 👻 – info harder to verify than Epstein list 🕵️‍♂️📜! Trump hopin' reports TRUE 🙏📈: 'VERY IMPORTANT SOURCES whisperin' killings SLOWIN' 😮‍💨🛑!' Mullahs EXECUTION PLANS on PAUSE ⏸️💀 after Trump threats got 'em SWEATIN' 😰💦 – is this the REGIME FALL ARC 🍿📉 or just TEMP CHILL? Protests from late Dec CURRENCY COLLAPSE 💸😵 to FULL-ON REVOLT against Ayatollah crew 👳‍♂️🤡 – Trump not pickin' sides YET but eyein' that POWER VACUUM 🌀👀. World holdin' breath 🫁🌍 as Iran TENSE AF 😬⚡ – will Orange Daddy unleash the EAGLES 🦅💥 or let protesters DIY the Mullah BBQ 🔥🍖‼️
